configuration.target_regex.description: Regular expression to be matched against the module target. Only targets that match this regex will be instrumented.
configuration.function_regex.description: Regular expression to be matched against a function name. Only functions that match this regex will be instrumented.
configuration.demangle_function_names.description: Demangle functions names passed to the runtime.

alloca.address.description: The address of the allocated memory.
alloca.size.description: The size of the allocation in bytes.
alloca.id.description: A unique ID associated with the alloca.

load.id.description: A unique ID associated with the load.

store.id.description: A unique ID associated with the store.

module.filter.description: Static property filter to exclude instrumentation.

global.address.description: The address of the global variable.
global.declared_size.description: The size of the global in bytes.
global.name.description: The name of the global variable.
global.id.description: A unique ID associated with the global.

function.id.description: A unique ID associated with the function.
A unique ID associated with the function.
